zh.lifeSummary: 當Katharine Majorbankis於1516年1月出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安卡農蓋特時，她的父親Sir William Majorbankis26歲，母親Lady Isabelle Fairley22歲。她和Patrick Wilsone至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1607年9月27日在英國倫敦享年91歲。

zh-hans.Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland: 苏格兰米德洛迪安卡農蓋特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katharine Majorbankis于1516年1月出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安卡農蓋特时，她的父亲Sir William Majorbankis26岁，母亲Lady Isabelle Fairley22岁。她和Patrick Wilsone至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1607年9月27日在英国倫敦享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Katharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Katherine , associated by folk etymology with Greek katharos ‘pure’. This is the preferred spelling in Germany. It is also the one used in the name of the American film star Katharine Hepburn ( 1907–2003 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Katharine Majorbankis was born in January 1516, in Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Sir William Majorbankis, was 26 and her mother, Lady Isabelle Fairley, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Patrick Wilsone. She died on 27 September 1607, in London, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katharine Majorbankis est née en janvier 1516, à Canongate, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir William Majorbankis, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabelle Fairley, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Patrick Wilsone. Elle est décédée le 27 septembre 1607, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katharine Majorbankis im Januar 1516 in Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Majorbankis 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabelle Fairley 22. Sie hatte mit Patrick Wilsone mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. September 1607 im Alter von 91 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine Majorbankis è nata il nel gennaio 1516 nel Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Sir William Majorbankis, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabelle Fairley, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Patrick Wilsone. Morì il 27 settembre 1607, nel London, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katharine Majorbankisが1516年1月にスコットランドミドロスアンカノンガトで生まれた時，父Sir William Majorbankisは26歳，母Lady Isabelle Fairleyは22歳であった。彼女はPatrick Wilsoneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1607年9月27日にイギリスロンドンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katharine Majorbankis(이)가 1516년 1월 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 캔옹가트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Majorbankis(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabelle Fairley(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Patrick Wilsone(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1607년 9월 27일 영국 런던에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katharine Majorbankis nasceu em janeiro de 1516, em Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Majorbankis, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabelle Fairley, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Patrick Wilsone. Ela faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1607, em London, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katharine Majorbankis родилась январь 1516 г. в местности канонгэит, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir William Majorbankis было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabelle Fairley, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Patrick Wilsone. Она умерла 27 сентября 1607 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katharine Majorbankis nació en enero de 1516, en Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Majorbankis, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Isabelle Fairley, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Patrick Wilsone. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1607, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
